entity.label: Paddan
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A plain, occurring only in Gen. 48:7, where it designates Padan-aram.

nodes.label: Paddan
nodes.description: A plain, occurring only in Gen. 48:7, where it designates Padan-aram.

verses.text: And as for me, when I came from Padan, Rachel died by me in the land of Canaan in the way, when yet there was but a little way to come unto Ephrath: and I buried her there in the way of Ephrath; the same is Bethlehem.
